productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Red Check Shirt
description: Style NoteThis checked shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with  jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Product DetailsRed checked shirt with hints of black and grey, has a medium spread collar with a press clasp front placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid buttons, pockets on the front with press clasp closure, embroidered branding above the left pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
